command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.118 "
echo === PHASE A: STATIC IP CHANGE TO .203 ===

# Write new interfaces config
sudo tee /etc/network/interfaces > /dev/null << 'IFACE_EOF'
# This file describes the network interfaces available on your system
# and how to activate them. For more information, see interfaces(5).
source /etc/network/interfaces.d/*

# The loopback network interface
auto lo
iface lo inet loopback

# The primary network interface
allow-hotplug ens33
auto ens33
iface ens33 inet static
  address 192.168.0.203
  netmask 255.255.255.0
  gateway 192.168.0.1
  dns-nameservers 8.8.8.8 8.8.4.4
IFACE_EOF

echo Written new interfaces config:
cat /etc/network/interfaces

# Schedule reboot in 1 minute using at or direct
echo \"sudo systemctl restart networking 2>/dev/null; sudo ip addr flush dev ens33; sudo ifup ens33\" | sudo at now + 1 minute 2>/dev/null || sudo nohup bash -c \"sleep 5 && sudo systemctl restart networking\" &>/dev/null &
echo IP_CHANGE_SCHEDULED
" 2>&1
